description: Claude Code Dev Team hooks (18 total): commit quality, cost tracking, MCP health, config protection, design quality, batch format, audit log, compact suggestion, error logging, test runner, branch protection, large file warner, session summary, MemPalace session-start / stop / pre-compact.

hooks.command: input=$(cat | jq -r '.input // empty'); if echo "$input" | grep -qE 'rm\s+(-[a-zA-Z]*r[a-zA-Z]*f|--recursive.*--force|-rf)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf is dangerous' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: Block rm -rf

hooks.command: input=$(cat | jq -r '.input // empty'); if echo "$input" | grep -qE 'git\s+push.*(-f|--force).*\s+(main|master)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force pushing to main/master is not allowed.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: Block force push to main/master

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/--no-verify/.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write('[devteam] BLOCKED: --no-verify is not allowed. Let git hooks run.\n');process.exit(2)}process.stdout.write(d)})"
hooks.description: Block --no-verify flag (git hooks must run)
Block direct commits / force pushes on main / master / production
Pre-commit: block debugger statements and secrets in staged files

hooks.command: filepath=$(cat | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty'); if echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key)$|/secrets/|credentials'; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify sensitive file: $filepath" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: Block writes to .env, .pem, .key, credentials files
Block modifications to linter/formatter config files
Suggest /compact every ~50 tool calls
Check MCP server health before tool execution
Warn at 500KB, block at 2MB to protect context
Record errors to ~/.claude/error-log.md
Audit log all bash commands with auto-redaction
Accumulate edited JS/TS files for batch format at Stop
Warn on generic template-looking frontend UI
Run sibling test files and report failures
Track MCP server failures with exponential backoff
Batch format (Prettier) + typecheck (tsc) all edited JS/TS files
Check for stray console.log in modified files
Track token usage and estimated cost per response
Append session summary to ~/.claude/sessions/ for later search
Mine session into MemPalace for future search (no-op if mempalace not installed)
Snapshot key context into MemPalace before Claude compresses it (no-op if mempalace not installed)

hooks.command: echo '[devteam] Dev team online — 12 agents + 18 hooks active. Three red lines: closure discipline, fact-driven, exhaustiveness.' >&2; exit 0

hooks.description: Surface MemPalace status + cwd-matching memories at session boot (no-op if mempalace not installed)
